problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: If Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus is applied to subjective, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
